channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Tehran Says No Decision On US Deal, Qatar Delegation Arrives For Talks
item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

item.title: Riots Bring Belfast To Standstill. How Race-Hate Tension Triggered Protests

media:content.media:description: The protest started after a knife attack in north Belfast on Monday night.

item.description: During the violence, shops were forced to close, events were cancelled, and public transport was badly affected.
item.content:encoded: During the violence, shops were forced to close, events were cancelled, and public transport was badly affected.

item.title: Deadly Philippine Quake Raised Seabed By Up To Two Metres

media:content.media:description: The 7.8-magnitude tremor in southern Mindanao island on Monday killed at least 61 people.

item.description: A powerful earthquake that killed at least 61 people in the Philippines this week raised the seabed by as much as two metres (6.6 feet), exposing coral and harming...
item.content:encoded: A powerful earthquake that killed at least 61 people in the Philippines this week raised the seabed by as much as two metres (6.6 feet), exposing coral and harming...

item.title: German Heiress Shot Dead At Family's Luxury Safari Estate In South Africa

media:content.media:description: Caroline von Rantzau, 26, was found dead inside her room on June 1

item.description: The heiress had reportedly recently purchased additional properties in the region and was managing wildlife-related operations at the lodge.
item.content:encoded: The heiress had reportedly recently purchased additional properties in the region and was managing wildlife-related operations at the lodge.

item.title: Inside 24-Hour Talks That Led White House To Act Against Anthropic's AI Model

media:content.media:description: Officials began worrying that the model's safety protections might not be strong enough

item.description: The move came after concerns were raised about Anthropic's newly released AI model, Fable, which the company had said was safe.
item.content:encoded: The move came after concerns were raised about Anthropic's newly released AI model, Fable, which the company had said was safe.

item.title: First-Of-A-Kind New York Law Seeks Tech To Block 3D Printers From Making Guns

media:content.media:description: Firearms made with 3D printers are increasingly being used in crimes.

item.description: About one-third of US states already have taken steps to ban or regulate build-it-yourself firearms that lack serial numbers.
item.content:encoded: About one-third of US states already have taken steps to ban or regulate build-it-yourself firearms that lack serial numbers.

item.title: Switzerland Votes On Proposal To Cap Population At 10 Million

media:content.media:description: Switzerland's ageing population is already above 9 million.

item.description: Swiss voters decide on Sunday whether to back a proposal to cap the country's population in a referendum likened to Britain's Brexit vote,
item.content:encoded: Swiss voters decide on Sunday whether to back a proposal to cap the country's population in a referendum likened to Britain's Brexit vote,

item.title: High-school Dropout To Crime Boss: About Venezuela's 'Nino Guerrero' Killed In US Raid

media:content.media:description: Guerrero was the boss both inside and outside the prison.

item.description: The Tren de Aragua leader killed in a US-Venezuelan raid was a high school dropout who lived in comfort behind bars as he transformed a prison gang into one of the most powerful...
item.content:encoded: The Tren de Aragua leader killed in a US-Venezuelan raid was a high school dropout who lived in comfort behind bars as he transformed a prison gang into one of the most powerful...

item.title: Epstein's Fashion World Ties To Get 'Cute French Girls, Women As Gifts'

media:content.media:description: At least six people from the modelling industry regularly introduced young models to Epstein

item.description: Around 2005, Epstein gave French modelling agent Jean-Luc Brunel access to a $1 million credit line to help him start a modelling agency called MC2 Model Management.
item.content:encoded: Around 2005, Epstein gave French modelling agent Jean-Luc Brunel access to a $1 million credit line to help him start a modelling agency called MC2 Model Management.

item.title: How 3 Million Barrel Cut By China Helped Stabilise Oil Prices Amid Iran War

media:content.media:description: China has not been hit hard by the oil disruption because it has large reserves built up

item.description: The world's second-largest economy has reduced its daily oil imports by 3 million barrels.
item.content:encoded: The world's second-largest economy has reduced its daily oil imports by 3 million barrels.

item.title: Before Building Rockets, These SpaceX Executives Built Race Cars At College

media:content.media:description: The link between Cornell's racing club and SpaceX has become well known among former employees

item.description: Several senior SpaceX executives got their start building Formula-style race cars at Cornell University
item.content:encoded: Several senior SpaceX executives got their start building Formula-style race cars at Cornell University

item.title: The Government Support That Helped Elon Musk Build Tesla And SpaceX

media:content.media:description: Tesla also received government support during its early years.

item.description: SpaceX was awarded more than $500 million in government grants and contracts during its early years.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX was awarded more than $500 million in government grants and contracts during its early years.

item.title: Samsung Plans Floating AI Data Centres On Ships To Meet Growing Demand

media:content.media:description: The idea is to help meet the growing need for data centres

item.description: The idea is to help meet the growing need for data centres, which require large amounts of space, electricity and cooling.
item.content:encoded: The idea is to help meet the growing need for data centres, which require large amounts of space, electricity and cooling.

item.title: Japan Delegation To Visit Greenland To Evaluate Rare Earth Extraction
item.description: Japan is preparing to send a delegation to Greenland this summer to evaluate possible rare earth extraction, the Nikkei newswire reported on Sunday. The visit would include
item.content:encoded: Japan is preparing to send a delegation to Greenland this summer to evaluate possible rare earth extraction, the Nikkei newswire reported on Sunday. The visit would include

item.title: North Korea Says Nuclear Status 'Irreversible'

media:content.media:description: North Korea has accelerated its nuclear weapons programme since talks with the US broke down.

item.description: North Korea said Sunday its status as a nuclear weapons state was "irreversible" and key to ensuring regional stability, rejecting calls by the United States...
item.content:encoded: North Korea said Sunday its status as a nuclear weapons state was "irreversible" and key to ensuring regional stability, rejecting calls by the United States...

item.title: Dozens Protest Peace Deal With US Outside Iran Foreign Ministry

media:content.media:description: Protestors accused Iranian negotiators of having made too many concessions to secure the deal.

item.description: Dozens protested Saturday outside a foreign ministry office in Iran's northeastern city of Mashhad, chanting slogans against top diplomat Abbas Araghchi after a televised interview in which he discussed signing...
item.content:encoded: Dozens protested Saturday outside a foreign ministry office in Iran's northeastern city of Mashhad, chanting slogans against top diplomat Abbas Araghchi after a televised interview in which he discussed signing...

item.title: OpenAI Hit With Multi-state Probe Into Possible User Harm As IPO Looms

media:content.media:description: OpenAI highlighted measures it has taken to keep children using its chatbot safe.

item.description: OpenAI has drawn criticism for ChatGPT allegedly offering encouraging words to users thinking of killing themselves or engaging criminal acts.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI has drawn criticism for ChatGPT allegedly offering encouraging words to users thinking of killing themselves or engaging criminal acts.

item.title: Air In California Turns Toxic As Huge Warehouse Fire Burns For 3rd Day

media:content.media:description: Poorly functioning sprinklers and hydrants with little to no flow hindered firefighter efforts.

item.description: Firefighters expected the next few days to remain smoky amid a lengthy effort to put out the fire inside the building.
item.content:encoded: Firefighters expected the next few days to remain smoky amid a lengthy effort to put out the fire inside the building.

item.title: Why Trump Family-linked Luxury Resort In Albania Is Facing Unrelenting Protests

media:content.media:description: Protest groups fear sections of that pristine coastline could be snapped up by powerful investors.

item.description: The luxury project has two components: a coastal development in the Narta Lagoon area, which is a wildlife reserve, and a smaller resort on the nearby uninhabited island of Sazan, a communist-era military base.
item.content:encoded: The luxury project has two components: a coastal development in the Narta Lagoon area, which is a wildlife reserve, and a smaller resort on the nearby uninhabited island of Sazan, a communist-era military base.

item.title: London Footballer Accused Of 'Dine-And-Dash' After Ordering Japanese Whisky Worth Rs 2.5 Lakh

media:content.media:description: The most eye-catching allegation involves two shots of Yamazaki malt whisky valued at 2,047 pounds.

item.description: Prosecutors allege that Dome-Bemwin failed to pay for food and drinks on six separate occasions, with the unpaid bills totalling 3,522.80 pound (Rs 4,49,579)..
item.content:encoded: Prosecutors allege that Dome-Bemwin failed to pay for food and drinks on six separate occasions, with the unpaid bills totalling 3,522.80 pound (Rs 4,49,579)..
